page_metadata.biotools__summary: SDMdata is a web-based software tool that collects occurrence data from the Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF) and checks species names and the accuracy of coordinates (latitude and longitude).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SDMdata is a web-based software tool that collects occurrence data from the Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF) and checks species names and the accuracy of coordinates (latitude and longitude).
